ucs.title: [LLM] ALPHV/BlackCat Rust encryptor launched with `--access-token` / `--propagated` flags
ucs.description: Hunts execution of the ALPHV/BlackCat Rust ransomware binary, which uniquely requires a `--access-token=<id>` argument plus a small family of mode flags (`--child`, `--paths`, `--propagated`, `--no-prop-servers`, `--no-vm-kill`, `--bypass`, `--safeboot`) to decrypt its embedded config and run. No legitimate software uses this argument set, so a single hit is high-fidelity for an in-progress Noberus/ALPHV deployment (CrowdStrike: SCATTERED SPIDER affiliate; Microsoft: tracked under DEV-0237 / RaaS Noberus cluster).
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=true count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Processes.process) as cmd values(Processes.parent_process_name) as parent values(Processes.user) as user from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where Processes.process="*--access-token*" OR (Processes.process="*--child*" AND Processes.process="*--paths*") OR (Processes.process="*--propagated*" AND Processes.process="*--no-prop-servers*") OR (Processes.process="*--no-vm-kill*" AND Processes.process="*--bypass*") OR (Processes.process="*--safeboot*" AND Processes.process="*--safeboot-instance*") by host Processes.process_name Processes.user Processes.parent_process_name | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` | where NOT match(user,"(?i).*\$$") | convert ctime(firstTime) ctime(lastTime)
ucs.kql:
// ALPHV/BlackCat Rust encryptor — argument fingerprint
let _alphv_token   = dynamic(["--access-token","-access-token","--access_token"]);
let _alphv_modes_a = dynamic(["--child","--paths","--propagated","--no-prop-servers","--no-prop","--prop-file"]);
let _alphv_modes_b = dynamic(["--no-vm-kill","--no-vm-kill-names","--bypass","--safeboot","--safeboot-instance","--safeboot-network","--drag-and-drop","--no-wall","--ui","--extra-verbose"]);
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(30d)
| where AccountName !endswith "$"          // skip machine accounts
| extend CmdLower = tolower(ProcessCommandLine)
| where CmdLower has_any (_alphv_token)
   or (CmdLower has_any (_alphv_modes_a) and CmdLower has_any (_alphv_modes_b))
| extend SuspiciousLocation = FolderPath has_any (@"\AppData\", @"\Temp\", @"\PerfLogs\", @"\Users\Public\", @"\Windows\Temp\", @"\ProgramData\")
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName,
          FileName, FolderPath, SHA256,
          ProcessCommandLine,
          ParentImage = InitiatingProcessFileName,
          ParentCmd   = InitiatingProcessCommandLine,
          IsRemoteSession = InitiatingProcessTokenElevation,
          SuspiciousLocation
| order by Timestamp desc
ucs.sigma_yaml:
title: ALPHV/BlackCat Rust Ransomware Execution Arguments
id: 7d3f0a9b-21c0-4e1f-b94d-alphvbc0001
status: experimental
description: Detects the ALPHV (BlackCat / Noberus) Rust ransomware binary which requires a --access-token argument and uses a distinctive set of mode flags such as --child / --paths / --propagated / --no-prop-servers / --no-vm-kill / --safeboot.
references:
  - https://www.microsoft.com/security/blog/2022/06/13/the-many-lives-of-blackcat-ransomware/
  - https://www.cisa.gov/news-events/cybersecurity-advisories/aa23-353a
author: SOC Detection Engineering
date: 2026/05/05
tags:
  - attack.impact
  - attack.t1486
  - threat.actor.alphv
  - threat.actor.blackcat
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection_token:
    CommandLine|contains:
      - '--access-token'
      - '-access-token'
      - '--access_token'
  selection_modes_a:
    CommandLine|contains:
      - '--child'
      - '--paths'
      - '--propagated'
      - '--no-prop-servers'
      - '--no-prop'
      - '--prop-file'
  selection_modes_b:
    CommandLine|contains:
      - '--no-vm-kill'
      - '--bypass'
      - '--safeboot'
      - '--safeboot-instance'
      - '--safeboot-network'
      - '--drag-and-drop'
      - '--no-wall'
  filter_machine_account:
    User|endswith: '$'
  condition: (selection_token or (selection_modes_a and selection_modes_b)) and not filter_machine_account
fields:
  - Image
  - CommandLine
  - ParentImage
  - User
falsepositives:
  - None known — argument set is unique to ALPHV/BlackCat
level: critical
ucs.rationale: BlackCat's Rust encryptor refuses to run without an `--access-token` value supplied at the command line — this design is unique among major ransomware families and was specifically called out by Microsoft (DEV-0237 / Noberus) and the FBI #StopRansomware advisory. Pairing the access-token flag with the encryptor's other distinctive switches (`--propagated`, `--no-prop-servers`, `--no-vm-kill`, `--s
_sigma_issues: sigma parse error: Sigma rule identifier must be an UUID

ucs.title: [LLM] BlackCat ExMatter / rclone bulk exfiltration to MEGA / file-share staging
ucs.description: Hunts ALPHV/BlackCat's signature pre-encryption exfiltration step: their custom .NET tool ExMatter (a.k.a. Fendr) or, more commonly, rclone.exe configured against MEGA, sftp or webdav targets, run from atypical paths (Temp / ProgramData / PerfLogs) and pushing large volumes to anonfiles, file.io, MEGA.nz, or transfer.sh. This double-extortion exfil step is consistently observed in BlackCat intrusions (Symantec Threat Hunter Team / Microsoft Threat Intelligence) and is the highest-leverage point to interrupt the chain before T1486 fires.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=true count values(Processes.process) as cmd values(Processes.parent_process_name) as parent from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where (Processes.process_name IN ("rclone.exe","megasync.exe","megacmd.exe","exmatter.exe","fendr.exe") OR (Processes.process="*rclone*" AND (Processes.process="*mega:*" OR Processes.process="*--config*" OR Processes.process="*copy*" OR Processes.process="*sync*" OR Processes.process="*--transfers*" OR Processes.process="*--multi-thread-streams*")) OR (Processes.process="*.exe*" AND Processes.process="*-secure*" AND Processes.process="*-host*" AND Processes.process="*-port*")) by host Processes.process_name Processes.user Processes.parent_process_name | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` | where NOT match(user,"(?i).*\$$") | join type=inner host [| tstats summariesonly=true sum(All_Traffic.bytes_out) as bytesOut values(All_Traffic.dest) as dest values(All_Traffic.dest_port) as dport from datamodel=Network_Traffic.All_Traffic where (All_Traffic.dest="*.mega.nz" OR All_Traffic.dest="*.mega.io" OR All_Traffic.dest="*.userstorage.mega.co.nz" OR All_Traffic.dest="*.anonfiles.com" OR All_Traffic.dest="file.io" OR All_Traffic.dest="transfer.sh" OR All_Traffic.dest="*.tempsend.com" OR All_Traffic.dest="send.exploit.in") OR All_Traffic.bytes_out>104857600 by host All_Traffic.src | `drop_dm_object_name(All_Traffic)`] | where bytesOut > 104857600
ucs.kql:
// ALPHV/BlackCat — ExMatter / rclone staging + MEGA-class destination
let _exfil_bins = dynamic(["rclone.exe","megasync.exe","megacmd.exe","exmatter.exe","fendr.exe","filezilla.exe","winscp.exe"]);
let _exfil_domains = dynamic(["mega.nz","mega.io","mega.co.nz","userstorage.mega.co.nz","anonfiles.com","file.io","transfer.sh","tempsend.com","send.exploit.in","gofile.io","bashupload.com","temp.sh"]);
let _suspicious_paths = dynamic([@"\Temp\",@"\AppData\",@"\ProgramData\",@"\PerfLogs\",@"\Users\Public\",@"\Windows\Temp\",@"\Recycle"]);
// 1. Exfil-tool process — rclone with mega/sftp config OR ExMatter binary OR rclone copy/sync from suspicious dir
let ExfilProcs =
    DeviceProcessEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(7d)
    | where AccountName !endswith "$"
    | extend CmdLower = tolower(ProcessCommandLine)
    | where FileName in~ (_exfil_bins)
         or (CmdLower has "rclone" and CmdLower has_any ("mega:"," copy "," sync ","--transfers","--multi-thread-streams","--config"))
         or CmdLower has_all ("-secure","-host","-port")     // ExMatter sftp args
    | where FolderPath has_any (_suspicious_paths)
         or InitiatingProcessFolderPath has_any (_suspicious_paths)
         or CmdLower has_any (_exfil_domains);
// 2. Same hosts beaconing/POSTing to MEGA-class destinations
let ExfilNet =
    DeviceNetworkEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(7d)
    | where RemoteIPType == "Public"
    | where InitiatingProcessFileName in~ (_exfil_bins)
         or RemoteUrl has_any (_exfil_domains)
    | summarize Bytes = countif(ActionType == "ConnectionSuccess"),
                Hits  = count(),
                Dests = make_set(RemoteUrl, 32),
                Procs = make_set(InitiatingProcessFileName, 16)
              by DeviceId, DeviceName, bin(Timestamp, 30m)
    | where Hits > 50 or array_length(Dests) > 1;
ExfilProcs
| join kind=inner ExfilNet on DeviceId
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName,
          ExfilTool = FileName, FolderPath,
          ProcessCommandLine,
          ParentImage = InitiatingProcessFileName,
          NetWindow = Timestamp1, Hits, Dests, Procs
| order by Timestamp desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
// ALPHV/BlackCat — ExMatter / rclone staging + MEGA-class egress (Sentinel)
let _exfil_bins = dynamic(["rclone.exe","megasync.exe","megacmd.exe","exmatter.exe","fendr.exe","filezilla.exe","winscp.exe"]);
let _exfil_domains = dynamic(["mega.nz","mega.io","mega.co.nz","userstorage.mega.co.nz","anonfiles.com","file.io","transfer.sh","tempsend.com","send.exploit.in","gofile.io","bashupload.com"]);
let _suspicious_paths = dynamic([@"\Temp\",@"\AppData\",@"\ProgramData\",@"\PerfLogs\",@"\Users\Public\",@"\Windows\Temp\"]);
let ExfilProcs =
    SecurityEvent
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
    | where EventID == 4688
    | where Account !endswith "$"
    | extend CmdLower = tolower(CommandLine), ImgLower = tolower(NewProcessName)
    | where ImgLower has_any (_exfil_bins)
         or (CmdLower has "rclone" and CmdLower has_any ("mega:"," copy "," sync ","--transfers","--multi-thread-streams","--config"))
         or CmdLower has_all ("-secure","-host","-port")
    | where ImgLower has_any (_suspicious_paths) or CmdLower has_any (_exfil_domains)
    | project ProcTime = TimeGenerated, Computer, Account, NewProcessName, CommandLine, ParentProcessName;
let ExfilNet =
    CommonSecurityLog
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
    | where DestinationHostName has_any (_exfil_domains)
         or RequestURL has_any (_exfil_domains)
         or SentBytes > 104857600
    | summarize TotalBytes = sum(toint(SentBytes)),
                Dests = make_set(coalesce(DestinationHostName, RequestURL), 32),
                Hits = count()
              by SourceHostName, bin(TimeGenerated, 30m);
ExfilProcs
| join kind=inner ExfilNet on $left.Computer == $right.SourceHostName
| where TimeGenerated between (ProcTime - 30m .. ProcTime + 2h)
| project ProcTime, Computer, Account, NewProcessName, CommandLine, ParentProcessName, NetWindow = TimeGenerated, TotalBytes, Hits, Dests
| order by ProcTime desc
ucs.rationale: ExMatter/Fendr is a tool authored specifically for the BlackCat/ALPHV affiliate program (Symantec Threat Hunter Team, Aug 2022) and rclone-to-MEGA is the documented fallback when ExMatter isn't deployed (CISA AA23-353A, Microsoft DEV-0237). Generic ransomware crews favour MegaSync GUI or simple HTTP POST; BlackCat's distinctive combination is (a) console-mode rclone with explicit `mega:` remote an
